name: Point Axis Waypoints
description: Create PointAxisWaypoints from parallel lists of points and Z-axes, for cylindrically symmetric tools.

inputParameters.name: points
inputParameters.description: Ordered list of target points (Rhino Point or COMPAS Point) in WCF.

inputParameters.name: axes
inputParameters.description: Ordered list of target Z-axes (Rhino Vector or COMPAS Vector). Must match `points` in length.

inputParameters.name: target_mode
inputParameters.description: Which frame on the robot to align: 'ROBOT' (default), 'TOOL', or 'WORKPIECE'.

inputParameters.name: native_scale
inputParameters.description: Scale factor: user_value * native_scale = meters. Defaults to 1.0.
